_note: Captured WebIQ (web search) results for downtown San Francisco hotels across star tiers (3/4/5-star). Hotel names, addresses and approximate nightly rates are real and were retrieved via web search; coordinates are approximate. The LIVE WebIQ path re-runs the search at demo time and filters by the requested star rating.
query: best hotels in downtown San Francisco near Union Square, SoMa and Yerba Buena (3-, 4- and 5-star)

hotels.name: Four Seasons Hotel San Francisco
hotels.highlights: Equinox Sports Club access, full-service spa, steps from Moscone Center, Union Square and Yerba Buena Gardens.

hotels.name: The St. Regis San Francisco
hotels.highlights: Contemporary luxury, Remède Spa, butler service, adjacent to SFMOMA and Yerba Buena.

hotels.name: Palace Hotel, a Luxury Collection Hotel
hotels.address: 2 New Montgomery St, San Francisco, CA 94105
hotels.highlights: Historic grand hotel, glass-domed Garden Court, short walk to Union Square and Yerba Buena.

hotels.name: Taj Campton Place
hotels.highlights: Boutique luxury, Michelin-starred dining, directly on Union Square.

hotels.name: The Ritz-Carlton, San Francisco
hotels.highlights: Iconic Nob Hill landmark, full-service spa, club lounge, short walk to Union Square.

hotels.name: Grand Hyatt San Francisco Union Square
hotels.highlights: Full-service tower directly on Union Square, OneUP restaurant, skyline rooms.

hotels.name: Hotel Nikko San Francisco
hotels.highlights: Indoor pool and fitness club, Feinstein's cabaret, a block from Union Square and the theater district.

hotels.name: Hotel Zetta San Francisco
hotels.highlights: Design-forward SoMa boutique, The Cavalier brasserie, close to Moscone and Yerba Buena.

hotels.name: Hotel Union Square
hotels.highlights: Historic 1913 property right on the Powell St cable car line, steps from Union Square.

hotels.name: The Mosser Hotel
hotels.highlights: Victorian-era value hotel near Westfield Centre, Moscone and Yerba Buena.

hotels.name: Powell Hotel
hotels.address: 28 Cyril Magnin St, San Francisco, CA 94102
hotels.highlights: Compact European-style rooms by the Powell St BART/Muni station and Union Square.
